title: WebSiteMCP Contract
description: Meta-schema for a WebSiteMCP contract: the abstract, shared tool interface for a category. Authored once per category and reused across every site that implements it. A contract defines the full menu of methods and their I/O; manifests declare per-site subsets, and bindings implement them. Part of WebSiteMCP spec version 1.0.

id.description: Category identifier, e.g. 'banking'. Must match the filename stem before '@'.

version.description: Interface version. Bumps when a method or param/return/error schema is added, changed, or renamed. Must match the '@<version>' in the filename.

required.description: Optional conformance core: method names every implementing manifest MUST declare. Enables the 'contract.required subset of manifest.methods' floor.

methods.description: The full set of methods this category defines, keyed by method name.

semver.description: MAJOR.MINOR version line for the interface.

summary.description: One-line, agent-facing description of what the method does.

params.description: JSON-Schema-style object describing the call parameters. The names here are the only valid {{tokens}} a binding may inject.

returns.description: JSON-Schema-style object describing the result. The property names here are the only valid output fields a binding may extract.

errors.description: The closed set of error codes this method may raise. A binding may only map a recognized failure to one of these codes.

code.description: Stable, machine-readable error code, e.g. INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.

schemaObject.description: A constrained JSON-Schema subset. Must declare a type; object types declare properties (+ optional required).
